📰 TLDR

Anthropic sues Pentagon ⚖️, Siri delays Apple products 🖥️, Claude Code Review 👨‍💻

Anthropic has filed two lawsuits against the Department of War to change the Pentagon's decision to label it a 'supply chain risk' ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Cutting development time ✂️, relationships not features 🤝, the interface was the product 🖥️

Generative UI builds interfaces dynamically using approved components, contextual data, and a trained language model instead of fixed layouts ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌
